response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on full-stack engineer with ~16 years of broad experience across web, embedded, and data-integration systems, but the role requires a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategic advisory experience. The resume shows only recent, brief exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq, ~6 months) and no evidence of leading AI strategy, advising strategic customers, or shipping recognized AI products at scale.
strengths: ~16 years of polyglot engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput data systems
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Track record of community leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership or recognized AI products at the scale this Director-level IC role requires
Title and scope (Senior/Staff IC) are below Principal/Director-level strategic advisory expectations
Limited cloud-platform strategy experience; cloud work is primarily AWS CDK application-level, not platform/architecture strategy

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
